Spikefish  

Animal
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 24th, 2007

Category: EverQuest

Minimum Level: 13
Maximum Level: 16
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-08-24 15:54:56
Known Loot:
Crude Defiant Buckler
Simple Defiant Chain Coif
Simple Defiant Cloth Sandals
Simple Defiant Cloth Wristwrap

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Razortooth

Report a correction

Post Comment
Phinney Server
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2016 at 12:33 AM Rating: Good
Bijou
View User Forum
GBATE!! Never saw it coming
9,998 posts
Do not underestimate this dude.

QUADDED for 15 16 20 20

Instant respawn. Not even kidding.

Oh, and no loot of any kind so far (12 kills in a row).
____________________________
remorajunbao wrote:
One day I'm going to fly to Canada and open the curtains in your office.

▲ Page top
Rare Loot
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2002 at 3:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759923715
16 posts
Looted a spikefish poison sack/gland the other day. I can't find any mention of this item on any web site. Any ideas? My guess is it's for some rouge poison weapon additive. I'm selling it for 1,000 plat on Terris-Thule if anyone is interested. By the way, I love the K-pole for dueling other casters like wizzies... They can't get a spell off...They root my pet first and while they do that I run up to them and whack 'em. Poor wizzy...Your root only lasts so long on my pet unless you can refresh it :)

Kelimalandyutu 43 Magician, proud owner of Kerran Fishing Pole and Pegasus Feather Cloak.
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2001 at 1:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764704586
18 posts
this is the reason verdent made that because you could hit em run out of the water and nukem so that is why they can run on land
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2001 at 4:23 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Verant made it so you can't nuke things in water if your out of the water so the fish out of water is a glitch ... i saw a paranah do it and no one was attacking him...

P.S. same thing with arrows
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2001 at 1:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767290096
1 post
Um...hello?

If you could stand there on land and nuke fish in he water...can you say "exploit" boys and girls? I knew you could....
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2003 at 6:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759301666
136 posts
Huh? I used to nuke fish and pirahnas from the dock in Rivervale, without getting my feet wet. True it's not much of a battle but .....IT'S A FISH.
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2003 at 5:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1704672973637
Guru
5,311 posts
If that's true, you found a game bug. Nuking MOBs in the water from dry land is not allowed.

For the person who was being hit by a fish after you're on dry land, remember that MOBs have a much further melee reach than we do. Kind of a dirty trick, if ya ask me.
▲ Page top
Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2001 at 1:49 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I attacked this fish near an island of Kerran Tigers and it just tore me up. I swam to the little island and went back towards the middle of island where the fish Still hit me. It may have just been a glitch or something but be careful if you fight them.
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2001 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762584527
41 posts
I had this same problem in Nek forest, fighting the Piranas there. Though I think it was a glitch because I have killed them several times since and never had them leave the water.
▲ Page top
RE: Evil Fish!
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2001 at 3:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764116573
2 posts
I was hunting sharks in erudin's harbor when the sharks swam over the shore near the fish vendors.
I think there is a glitch in the game too.
